title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: July 27, 2023
summary: July 27 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a lower rate of 6.58% , from the level on 07/20/2023 of 7.640 M km 2 to 7.137 M km 2 for this week.
